headline: Starboard Campaign Puts CarMax Costs Digital Strategy And New CEO In Focus
summary: Starboard Value has built a roughly $350 million stake in CarMax (NYSE:KMX). The activist investor is launching a campaign that includes nominating two directors to the CarMax board. Starboard is pressing for cost reductions, more flexible pricing, and stronger digital capabilities as Keith Barr steps in as the new CEO. CarMax, the largest used vehicle retailer in the US, sits at the intersection of changing car buying habits and a more competitive used car market. The company has already...
